rulings.Case Title: LAFA PARTNERS, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIABILITY COMPANY VS. DANIEL I. CHADBOURNE JR ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Compel Further Responses To Demand For Inspection Of Documents And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 26, 2024 line 1. DEFENDANT DANIEL CHADBOURNE MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO DEMAND FOR INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS AND FOR SANCTIONS is OFF CALENDAR per request of the moving party. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: HUMANMADE, A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT CORPORATION VS. 150 HOOPER, INC., ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 26, 2024 line 4. DEFENDANT PLACEMADE, A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT CORPORATION DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend. Plaintiff failed to allege each element of the third cause of action subject to this demurrer as to this defendant or to allege facts, not conclusions basing the liability on agency principals. Plaintiff also failed to allege facts supporting delayed discovery. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: 1906 MISSION LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY VS. JOHN J. ORSZAK ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendant, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant John J. Orszak
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 26, 2024 line 7. PLAINTIFF 1906 MISSION LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY, TO ESTABLISH ADMISSIONS FROM DEFENDANT, AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFENDANT JOHN J. rulings.Case Title: GAETANI REAL ESTATE VS. ZACHARY HOWITT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 26, 2024 line 12. DEFENDANT ZACHARY HOWITT NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION is DENIED. Assuming that Defendant meets the requirements of CCP 1008, Defendant fails to cite any authority for the proposition that purportedly improper verification is a basis for granting a motion to quash service of summons and complaint. C.C.P 1179.01.5(b)(1) is inapposite. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.
